# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow the Uncodixify UI standard in [Uncodixfy.md](../Uncodixfy.md) for all UI work in this repository.
Use the Sega design standard in [docs/standards/sega.md](../docs/standards/sega.md) for Chackers branded game UI.

Apply both standards in this order:

1. Gameplay clarity and workflow.
2. Uncodixify quality filter.
3. Sega arcade visual layer.
4. Accessibility and readability.

When generating or editing UI:

- Avoid generic AI-looking dashboard aesthetics.
- Avoid decorative gradients, glows, glassmorphism, blur haze, floating shells, and dramatic shadows.
- Avoid oversized rounded corners, pill-heavy controls, generic hero sections, and fake premium copy.
- Prefer clear, functional, product-specific layouts with restrained spacing and simple borders.
- Use UI patterns that support the actual workflow instead of visual filler.
- Use Sega tokens and component rules for branded game controls, but simplify any treatment that harms usability.

For Chackers, prioritize:

- A clear playable checkers board.
- Readable timers and turn state.
- Obvious legal move hints.
- Compact match controls.
- Functional AI Coach, leaderboard, multiplayer, and Pro screens.
